title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 32
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about lost house keys.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you found your house keys? You looked worried earlier. || Man: Not at first. I searched the kitchen counter because I remembered using them there, then checked my coat pocket, but nobody had seen them. || Woman: So where did they turn up? || Man: My dad has just messaged me. [1]They are in the basket of my bicycle[/1]. I must have left them there. I will collect them at lunch because I need them for getting into the house later. || Woman: Great. You can stop searching now and concentrate on the day.
items.question: Where are the house keys?

options.B: In the basket of their bicycle

items.explanation: The speaker says the house keys are in the basket of their bicycle.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about buying a birthday present.
items.audio_script: Girl: Did you buy a birthday present for my aunt? You said you were going into town after school. || Boy: Yes, but choosing took a while. I first considered some flowers, because that seemed a safe choice. || Girl: What about a scarf? That might have been useful. || Boy: I looked at that, but it did not seem right. In the end, [2]I bought a cookery book because she enjoys trying new recipes[/2]. || Girl: That sounds thoughtful. I am sure it will be appreciated. || Boy: I hope so. I will wrap it this evening before tomorrow's party.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
items.explanation: The speaker says they bought a cookery book because she enjoys trying new recipes.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a part-time job at the garden centre.
items.audio_script: Woman: What job are you doing at the garden centre this afternoon? I thought you were going to water the plants. || Man: That was yesterday's plan, but somebody finished it before lunch. || Woman: So will you move the large pots instead? || Man: No, the manager says that is not needed today. [3]I have to label the seed packets because customers need to find them easily[/3]. || Woman: That sounds manageable, although you may be busy. || Man: Yes, I want to finish before five because I promised to meet my friends afterwards nearby.
items.question: What job will the speaker do?
items.explanation: The speaker says they have to label the seed packets because customers need to find them easily.

items.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on the school sports day.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are you ready for the school sports day tomorrow? I was checking what we have to bring, because I do not want to forget anything. || Boy: I was going to pack a scarf. Do we need that? || Girl: No, it is not on the list. || Boy: Perhaps I should take running shoes instead. || Girl: You can, but [4]everyone must bring a water bottle because there is nowhere to buy drinks near the field[/4]. || Boy: Thanks for reminding me. I will put it in my bag tonight, so I am ready when we leave.
items.question: What must the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone must bring a water bottle because there is nowhere to buy drinks near the field.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still planning to have a picnic this afternoon? I had already arranged everything for it. || Boy: I am afraid not. It may rain and the new exhibition is not open, so that plan will not work now. || Girl: We could visit the museum instead. Would that be easier? || Boy: I thought about that, but I have a better idea. [5]Let us go bowling this afternoon instead[/5]. || Girl: Fine with me. Where shall we meet? || Boy: Meet me by the bus stop at four, and bring your student card in case they ask for it.
items.question: What will they do?
items.explanation: The speaker suggests that they go bowling this afternoon instead.

items.context: You hear two students talking about homework group.
items.audio_script: Woman: Do you know where homework group is being held today? I was going to the library, where we usually meet. || Man: Do not go there. Tables are being moved and another class booked the computers, so the organiser changed the room. || Woman: I wondered whether it might be in the computer room. || Man: No, that is not right either. [6]We need to meet in room eleven this afternoon[/6]. || Woman: Thanks for telling me. I would have waited in the wrong place. || Man: I will message the others too, so nobody misses the beginning.
items.question: Where will homework group be held?
items.explanation: The speaker says they need to meet in room eleven.

items.context: You hear two people choosing food.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you decided what to eat? The queue is getting longer, so we should choose soon. || Boy: I was thinking about the pizza, or perhaps the fish pie, because both sounded nice. || Girl: Which one are you going to order then? || Boy: Neither, actually. We had pizza yesterday and the fish pie has sold out. [7]I am going to have vegetable pasta instead[/7]. || Girl: Good choice. I might order the same, because I am quite hungry too. || Boy: Great. Find us a table while I pay, and we can eat before the bus comes.
items.question: What will the speaker eat?
items.explanation: The speaker says they are going to have vegetable pasta instead.
